# The Meridian

> A private archive of antiques and historical objects, curated by Yulan Galagoda.

## About

The Meridian is a private reference collection of rare and historically significant
objects spanning 1590 to the present, collected along two threads: Sri Lanka and
Ceylon across every century (maps, photographs, documents, autographs, books), and
the instruments of progress — the small objects by which mankind learned to measure,
record, calculate, and see (slide rules, barometers, typewriters, cameras,
chronometers, and the books that carried ideas).

Each object is documented with provenance, a verification status (Verified /
Research Ongoing / Unverified), condition notes, origin country, era classification,
and full curatorial research. The archive is built as a static website backed by a
private Notion database. It is not a shop — nothing is for sale. It is a record.

## Collection

- Full catalogue: https://meridian.yulan.me/collection
- Browse by category: https://meridian.yulan.me/categories
- About the archive: https://meridian.yulan.me/about

Objects can be filtered by era, origin, condition, category, and tag, or explored
individually with full research, references, and gallery images.

## Narratives

Stories told by combining objects — each narrative connects objects acquired
separately into a single account (a year, a maker, a war, a way of seeing).

- All narratives: https://meridian.yulan.me/narratives

## The Archive — policies

- Collecting Policy: https://meridian.yulan.me/collecting-policy
- Verification & Provenance standard: https://meridian.yulan.me/verification-and-provenance
- Seeking (public want list): https://meridian.yulan.me/seeking
- Access, Citation & Image Use: https://meridian.yulan.me/access-citation-image-use
- Annual Review: https://meridian.yulan.me/annual-review

## Curator

Yulan Galagoda — collector, designer. Plymouth, United Kingdom.
